prompt: A cinematic dark fantasy portrait of a silver-haired dragon queen standing in the foreground on blackened volcanic rubble, with an enormous black dragon looming protectively behind her. The woman wears an intricate floor-length black gown with armored detailing on the bodice and shoulders, long fitted sleeves, a high structured collar, and a heavy dark cape trailing to the right. Her hair is platinum silver, extremely long, loose, and wavy, glowing softly in the firelight. Her face is intentionally obscured and indistinct, with no clear facial features. The dragon fills most of the background, with 2 large outstretched wings framing the scene, dense charcoal scales, many sharp horns and facial spikes, glowing amber eyes, and a massive curved neck arcing above the woman. Set in a ruined medieval city with burned stone towers and crumbling structures on both sides, active fires on the ground, drifting embers, smoke, and a blazing orange sunset sky with stormy clouds. Low-angle heroic composition, epic scale contrast between human and beast, ultra-detailed textures, photorealistic fantasy realism, dramatic rim lighting, fiery orange and black color palette, moody atmosphere, sharp focus on the queen and dragon, blockbuster poster aesthetic. Add the text Pollo.ai in clean white sans-serif near the upper right.
